response.justification: Wei Chen brings well over 6 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and recent hands-on AI-agent development including MCP tooling, which is an explicitly required and uncommon skill. Craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and a track record across product and infrastructure work fit the internal-tooling context well. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience, and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product and AI-agent (MCP) work
Strong testing and engineering culture: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, test-tooling authorship
Cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) plus MongoDB/SQL databases
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin absent; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Frontend depth leans toward Ember.js; React exposure is comparatively limited
